title: Additional Permission Options Required for Roles
excerpt: The Administration permission section is lacking in a lot of functionality with a large number of items available in the admin panel not directly linked to an option you can select to make available in a role.  We would …

posts.author: dboddy (Daniel Boddy)
posts.cookedHtml:
The Administration permission section is lacking in a lot of functionality with a large number of items available in the admin panel not directly linked to an option you can select to make available in a role. We would like to keep the full administration of the solution to admins, and then delegate permissions to super users in different areas of the business like Finance for billing or Managers for user administration etc. Just a very small subset of examples is

  1. User Management - no option for “create user/invite user” t
  2. User Management - no option for create roles
  3. User Management - no option for create departments
  4. Work Schedule (In Beta but no permissions options)
  5. The option under Admin to view the various sections is good but gives access to all subsections of those areas which you want to be able to be granular
